info.description: ProgreSQL backend API — AI-powered SQL assistant
info.title: ProgreSQL API

get.description: Returns aggregated token usage and cost per user. Admin-only endpoint. Optionally filter by month (YYYY-MM).

parameters.description: Filter by month in YYYY-MM format
parameters.name: month

get.description: Returns total and monthly token usage breakdown for a specific user. Admin-only endpoint.

post.description: Records a frontend analytics event (page_view, button_click, scroll_depth, video_play) from the landing page. Rate-limited to 100 requests per minute per IP.
Sends a password-reset code to the provided email address. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.
Authenticates the user with email and password and returns a JWT

get.description: Returns profile information for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns a JWT. If the email exists but is unverified, credentials are updated and a new verification code is sent.
Verifies the reset code and sets a new password for the user
Sends a one-time verification code to the authenticated user's email address
Issues a short-lived JWT for the local desktop client (no credentials required)
Validates the one-time code and marks the user's email as verified

get.description: Returns service status and current version

post.description: Records the authenticated user's acceptance of a specific legal document version

get.description:
Returns the latest active legal document of the given type. Use ?lang=ru|en to select language (default: ru).
Returns a specific version of the legal document.

Returns the latest active legal document of the given type. Use ?lang=ru|en to select language (default: ru).
Returns a specific version of the legal document.
Returns the list of available LLM models including which one is the default
Returns the current subscription price for the authenticated user, applying any active discount promo codes

post.description: Creates a Platega payment invoice for the authenticated user. Defaults to 20 USD if no amount is provided.
Receives payment callback from Platega.io. Verified via X-MerchantId and X-Secret headers. Grants 30 days of pro plan on CONFIRMED status.
Validates and applies a promo code for the authenticated user. Supports pro_grant, trial_extension, and discount code types.
Creates a new agent session and returns the session ID with the WebSocket URL to connect to
Creates a Platega payment invoice for the authenticated user via the v2 API. Defaults to 1999 RUB with card acquiring if not specified.
Receives payment callback from Platega.io via the v2 API. Verified via X-MerchantId and X-Secret headers. Grants 30 days of pro plan on CONFIRMED status.
